summary: Tested all new garage availability + bookings flow plus founder admin login. 9/9 new backend tests pass; full regression 23/24 pass (the 1 failure was a stale assertion against the old 3% open_banking discount; fixed in test to the current 1% per backend code). Frontend smoke covered landing, waitlist submit, /login chooser, founder email login, navbar admin role, and /book/:vppId page (loads garages and slots end-to-end).

issues: When the founder admin logs in via the 'consumer' intent, the app navigates them to /dashboard (My Waves), but the Navbar then hides the 'My Waves' link for admin (only Browse + Admin shown). Consider routing admin users straight to /admin after login.

action_items: (Optional UX) Redirect admin users to /admin after email login instead of /dashboard.
(Optional UX) Either show 'My Waves' for admin too, or hard-redirect /dashboard → /admin when role=admin.
critical_code_review_comments: PAYMENT_DISCOUNTS for open_banking changed from 3% → 1% and bank_transfer added at 0.5%; the legacy test_checkout_open_banking_mock_flow had stale expectations — updated to match the live constants. If 1% is intentional, this is fine; if a regression in business rules, revisit /app/backend/server.py:437.
BookFitter.jsx renders 146 slot buttons per garage with 14-day default; for accessibility/perf consider lazy-rendering or paginating by day so the slot grid stays scannable.
Booking endpoint correctly cancels the prior booking when the same user re-books the same wave (verified). Good idempotent UX.
Public GET /api/garages correctly hides contact_email/contact_phone (verified). Keep this behaviour.
test_credentials: Founder admin: founder@thecollectivesavers.co.uk / SaversCollective (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and backend/.env). Consumers/garages seeded ad-hoc in tests via mongosh + POST /api/garages/apply.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own TEST_-prefixed VPP (via founder admin), seeds an ephemeral consumer/garage via mongosh, and applies for garage role through POST /api/garages/apply. Cleanup not done; safe to leave because of unique uuid suffixes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend booking flow is solid. The only consideration left is the UX of admin-after-login redirect (currently /dashboard). Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_garage_booking_flow.py — it bootstraps founder, paid tyre consumer, garage, availability, slots and bookings end-to-end with mongosh + API calls.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in scope.
